name: SA Sample - Agent Provisioner
brief: Sample: one-click provisioning of a fully configured AI agent in Business Central.
description: Exercises the full agent CRUD surface — CreateAgent, SetAgentCapabilities, AddDataSource, AddToolLink, AddAuthorizedUser, ActivateAgent — from a single action. The reference for AppSource ISVs and BC partners who want to ship pre-baked AI agents alongside their D365 BC apps so customers get a working assistant on first install.
